context: A function sorts and returns the caller's array in place, mutating the input. Make it return a new array instead.

checklist.name: Identifies the in-place mutation of the argument
checklist.description: Identifies the in-place mutation of the argument

checklist.name: Returns a new array instead of mutating
checklist.description: Returns a new array instead of mutating

checklist.name: Leaves the caller's original array unchanged
checklist.description: Leaves the caller's original array unchanged
